title: Session 00–01 — Pods, Festival, Quake
bodyText:
# What happened
Eddy, Varen, and Felson found strange plant-pods near Koviz — deep roots, dangerous airborne particles — and fought off infected, mindless-aggressive animals that decomposed into the cracks when killed. They **burned the pods**; each held a magic mushroom (Felson: better-torch; Eddy: ~3 uses of bonus-action invisibility).

Festival day ended with an earthquake, a booming drone, and an eruption of vines + spores in the city: infected rodents, a giant river toad, and a **vine humanoid** hidden in the flora. Everyone was left battered, exhausted, coughing — **infected** — and headed for the clinic. Felsen was seen talking to a noble-looking gentleman ([[thread-noble-gentleman]]).
